_comment: Append this object to ~/.hermes/cron/jobs.json under the 'jobs' array, then `hermes cron reload` (or `systemctl reload hermes`). Schedule: 21:30 ET on weekdays — after stocks close (16:00 ET), after evening crypto settling, before midnight (and before the 00:00 UTC daily_pnl cron). Concurrent with shark_kb_update at the same minute is acceptable — the two crons touch disjoint files (decisions.md vs the kb/ tree) and neither holds long DB locks. NOTE: replace the workdir below with the absolute path to your trading-bot checkout (e.g. $HOME/Documents/trading-bot) before installing.
name: nightly_reflector
